institution.name: Lancaster County Career and Technology Center

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 39% at Lancaster County Career and Technology Center vs the 2003–2007 baseline (250 vs 411).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Lancaster County Career and Technology Center rose 22% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.5k → $15.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lancaster County Career and Technology Center fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lancaster County Career and Technology Center rose 35% between 2006 and 2009 (357 → 483).
